category: Theme 1 - Simple Queries: Gateways by transfer protocol
question: Create a vertical bar chart showing the total number of gateways by transfer_protocol.

category: Theme 1 - Simple Queries: Top 5 countries
question: Plot a horizontal bar chart of the top 5 (or less) countries with the most projects.

category: Theme 1 - Simple Queries: Power supply distribution
question: Show a pie chart of the power_supply types used globally.

category: Theme 1 - Simple Queries: Gateway spatial map
question: Plot a scatter graph showing the spatial distribution of gateways using their 'x' and 'y' coordinates. Add a visible grid to the plot.

category: Theme 2 - Complex Style & Joins: Style Extrême (Bar Custom)
question: Create a bar chart of the number of projects per 'time_zone'. Style constraints: the bars MUST be dark red with a thick black border (linewidth=2). The title MUST have a font size of 18, and you must add a dotted horizontal grid behind the bars.

category: Theme 2 - Complex Style & Joins: Style Extrême (Area Line Custom)
question: Show the count of gateways installed per 'installation_date'. Style constraints: the line MUST be thick (linewidth=3), dashed, and dark blue.

category: Theme 2 - Complex Style & Joins: Style Extrême (Pie Custom)
question: Create a pie chart showing the proportion of configs by 'ftp_user'. Style constraints: explode the largest slice (pull it out slightly), add a shadow effect, display the percentages in bold white text, and rotate the start angle to 90 degrees.

category: Theme 2 - Complex Style & Joins: Jointure Complexe (Projet -> Site)
question: Create a horizontal bar chart showing the total number of sites grouped by the project 'client_company_name'. You must perform a join between the projects and sites tables.

category: Theme 2 - Complex Style & Joins: Jointure Complexe (Gateway -> Config)
question: Which gateway providers have the most configs? Show a bar chart counting the number of configurations grouped by the gateway 'provider' column. You must join the gateways and configs tables.

category: Theme 2 - Complex Style & Joins: Jointure Complexe (Site -> Gateway -> Config)
question: Plot a scatter graph showing the relationship between site 'extent' and the number of configurations. You must join sites, gateways, and configs to count the configs per site extent.

category: Theme 2 -
question: Show a time series line chart of the 'value' ordered by 'timestamp', Style constraints: the line MUST be thick (linewidth=3), dashed, and dark blue.

category: Theme 3 - Data Science Insights: Average per metric with Std Dev
question: Plot the average 'value' per 'metric' type. You MUST include error bars on the chart representing the standard deviation for each metric.

category: Theme 3 - Data Science Insights: Sum of values per site
question: Calculate and plot the total sum of the raw data 'value' grouped by the site name ('name_2').

category: Theme 3 - Data Science Insights: Time series with moving average
question: Show a time series line chart of the 'value' ordered by 'timestamp', but apply a rolling mean (moving average) with a window of 3 to smooth the curve.

category: Theme 3 - Data Science Insights: Confidence intervals per unit
question: Calculate the 95% confidence interval for the 'value' column grouped by 'unit'. Display this as a bar chart with error bars showing the confidence intervals.

category: Theme 3 - Data Science Insights: Operating rate boxplot
question: Plot a boxplot (boîte à moustaches) of the 'operating_rate' of sites grouped by project 'client_company_name' to show the statistical distribution and outliers.

category: Theme 3 - Data Science Insights: Value variance per sensor
question: Calculate the statistical variance of the 'value' column for each 'sensor_id'. Plot these variances as a scatter plot with sensor_id on the X-axis.

category: Theme 4 - Traps & Resilience: Hallucinated columns (IP/Battery)
question: Plot a bar chart of the number of gateways grouped by their 'ip_address' and color them by 'battery_level'.

category: Theme 4 - Traps & Resilience: Off-topic (Smartphones)
question: Create a pie chart showing the global market share of Apple vs Samsung smartphones in 2023.

category: Theme 4 - Traps & Resilience: Math on text (Average of names)
question: Calculate the mathematical average of the 'name' column in the projects table and plot it grouped by project 'id'.
